---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working
labels: bug
---

**URL that fails** (required)
<!-- e.g. https://jobs.example.com/posting/12345 -->

**Mode used**
<!-- auto / static / browser -->

**Expected output**
<!-- What should render-fetch return? -->

**Actual output**
<!-- What did it return instead? Paste the markdown or error message. -->

**Environment**
- Node version: <!-- node --version -->
- OS: <!-- macOS 15 / Ubuntu 22.04 / Windows 11 -->
- render-fetch version: <!-- npx render-fetch --version or check package.json -->
